seoTitle: Greenwich Park vs Gregadoo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Greenwich Park and Gregadoo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Greenwich Park vs Gregadoo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Greenwich Park and Gregadoo.
heading: Greenwich Park vs Gregadoo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Greenwich Park, New South Wales and Gregadoo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gregadoo has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Greenwich Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Greenwich Park or Gregadoo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Greenwich Park has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Gregadoo scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Greenwich Park scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Gregadoo scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Greenwich Park or Gregadoo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gregadoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
